description: 二期批次一：只读资产目录与 Agent 对接预览层 - 前端资产目录、REST权限证明、只读catalog API、Agent preview/audit-ready页面

userStories.title: Add Catalog DTOs and Permission Proof DTOs to AssetDtos.java
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need response DTOs for catalog queries and permission proof checks so controllers have stable contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: CatalogProjectResponse record with: projectId, projectCode, projectName, projectStage, assetSource, modelCount, totalSizeBytes, confidenceLevel
CatalogDirectoryResponse record with: directoryPath, projectId, fileCount, totalSizeBytes

CatalogFileResponse record with: fileId, fileName, fileExt, fileKind, disciplineCode, disciplineName, version, sizeBytes, checksum, status, confidenceLevel, storageProvider, logicalPath, storagePathVisible, storagePathVisibilityReason, qualityFlags, lastVerifiedAt, updatedAt, agentReadable, agentReadReason, agentContractView
AuditContextResponse record with: fileId, recentEvents list with eventType/eventSummary/createdAt, totalEventCount
PermissionProofResponse record with: allowed, decision, actorType, projectScope, reasonCode, reasonText, evidence list, traceId, checkedAt
PermissionProofCheckRequest record with: fileIds list, actorType string
All records are serializable and use existing field naming conventions
Backend compiles: ./mvnw -pl delivery-data-steward -am -DskipTests compile

userStories.title: Add CatalogApplicationService read-only query methods
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need application service methods that query catalog data from existing tables/views with project-scope permission checks.
acceptanceCriteria: listCatalogProjects: returns projects filtered by current user's project access and optional assetSource filter
listCatalogDirectories: returns distinct directory paths with file counts for a project
listCatalogFiles: returns paginated files with filters (projectId, keyword, fileExt, fileKind, discipline, qualityIssue)
getCatalogFileDetail: returns single file detail with all fields including agentReadable/agentReadReason/agentContractView
getFileAuditContext: returns recent audit events for a file from AuditEventView or audit_event table
checkFilePermission / checkBulkPermission: evaluates whether current user or agent key can access given files, returns decision/reason/evidence
Agent contract view fields computed: agentReadable=true when file has valid project and is in formal asset status; agentReadReason explains why; agentContractView lists visible field names
Storage path visibility: admin in local dev sees real NAS path with reason 'LOCAL_DEV_ADMIN'; regular user sees masked path; unauthorized user gets empty
All methods are read-only: no INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE on project, file, scan task, path mapping, deletion request, or review tables
Backend compiles: ./mvnw -pl delivery-data-steward -am -DskipTests compile

userStories.title: Add CatalogController with read-only GET endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need REST endpoints to list projects, directories, files, and file details with permission-aware responses.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/data-steward/catalog/projects returns ApiResponse<List<CatalogProjectResponse>>, filtered by user's project access and optional ?assetSource= param
GET /api/data-steward/catalog/directories?projectId= returns ApiResponse<List<CatalogDirectoryResponse>>
GET /api/data-steward/catalog/files supports query params: projectId, keyword, fileExt, fileKind, disciplineCode, qualityIssue, page, pageSize; returns PageResponse<CatalogFileResponse>
GET /api/data-steward/catalog/files/{fileId} returns ApiResponse<CatalogFileDetailResponse> (detail includes agent fields); 404 for nonexistent file
GET /api/data-steward/catalog/files/{fileId}/audit-context returns ApiResponse<AuditContextResponse>
Unauthorized project access returns empty list (not error) for list endpoints; file detail returns 404
All responses include traceId via existing ApiResponse wrapper
Controller annotated with @RestController and @RequestMapping("/api/data-steward/catalog")
Backend compiles: ./mvnw -pl delivery-data-steward -am -DskipTests compile

userStories.title: Add PermissionProof REST endpoints
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I need permission proof endpoints that explain why access is allowed or denied without leaking secrets.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/data-steward/catalog/files/{fileId}/permission-proof returns PermissionProofResponse with allowed, decision, actorType, projectScope, reasonCode, reasonText, evidence list, traceId, checkedAt
POST /api/data-steward/catalog/permission-proofs:check accepts {fileIds:[...], actorType:"USER"|"AGENT_KEY"} and returns List<PermissionProofResponse>
Permission proof writes lightweight audit event (event_type=PERMISSION_PROOF_CHECK) but does NOT modify projects, files, scan tasks, path mappings, or NAS data
Permission proof never returns tokens, API keys, passwords, key hashes, or full permission tables
Evidence list contains only non-sensitive items: role name, project membership, API key scope
reasonCode is stable: e.g. PROJECT_MEMBER, ADMIN_FULL_ACCESS, NO_PROJECT_ACCESS, AGENT_KEY_SCOPE_MATCH, AGENT_KEY_OUT_OF_SCOPE
Backend compiles: ./mvnw -pl delivery-data-steward -am -DskipTests compile

userStories.title: Add frontend Catalog page with filters and detail drawer
userStories.description: As a platform user, I want to browse registered assets by directory view with filters for project, path, file type, extension, discipline, checksum status, and quality issues.
acceptanceCriteria: New page at route /data-steward/catalog with component AssetCatalogPage.vue
Project filter dropdown populated from catalog API (respects user's project access)
Directory/path filter: text input for path fragment search
File filters: fileName keyword, fileExt dropdown, fileKind select, discipline select, qualityIssue select
Results table with columns: fileName, fileExt, fileKind, disciplineName, version, sizeBytes, qualityFlags, agentReadable badge
Click row opens detail drawer showing: project info, file metadata, storage path visibility info, discipline, version, quality status, agent visibility fields
Detail drawer shows storagePathVisible and storagePathVisibilityReason
Pagination with existing page size options
Uses existing layout, Element Plus table/filter/drawer patterns
No hero sections, no marketing cards, no 3D
Frontend builds: corepack pnpm build

userStories.title: Add Agent Preview page and register routes/menu items
userStories.description: As a platform team member, I want an Agent Preview page showing what fields agents can see, permission proof results, and explicitly listing prohibited actions.
acceptanceCriteria: New page at route /data-steward/agent-preview with component AgentPreviewPage.vue
Section 1 - Catalog Sample: shows readonly table of files with agent-readable fields highlighted, non-readable fields grayed out
Section 2 - Permission Proof: input for fileId or projectCode, calls permission proof API, displays allowed/denied with reasonCode, reasonText, evidence, traceId
Section 3 - Agent Visible Fields: displays the field contract (which fields agent can see), masking rules for sensitive fields
Section 4 - Prohibited Actions: explicit list stating '本批只读 - 以下操作当前禁止: 写库、移动文件、正文抽取、向量化、自动审批、自动删除、模型轻量化', no real action buttons for these
No auto-approval, auto-delete, auto-fix, write-to-db, or vectorization UI elements anywhere on page
Routes registered: /data-steward/catalog and /data-steward/agent-preview in router/index.ts
Menu items added under '数据管家': 资产目录 (FolderOpened icon), Agent预览 (Monitor icon)
Menu items visible based on existing permission pattern
Frontend builds: corepack pnpm build

userStories.title: Create verification script, update README, run builds, write final report
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a verification script that proves all batch 1 interfaces are read-only and all deliverables are complete.
acceptanceCriteria: New script scripts/dev/check-phase2-batch1-readonly-catalog.sh is executable

Script checks: backend health, OpenAPI contains catalog+permission-proof paths, admin can query catalog, unauthorized user cannot see restricted projects/files, permission proof returns traceId+reasonCode, project/file/scan-task counts unchanged before/after, no scan tasks created by catalog calls
Script notes that permission proof audit events are expected lightweight audit behavior
scripts/README.md updated with entry for check-phase2-batch1-readonly-catalog.sh
Backend build passes: ./mvnw -pl delivery-app -am -DskipTests package
Frontend build passes: corepack pnpm build

handoff/dev-agent/latest-report.md written with: implementation scope, new/modified backend APIs, new/modified frontend pages/routes, permission boundary explanation, audit behavior explanation, explicit list of prohibited items NOT done, self-test commands and results, known risks, changed file list
